posts.author: NorthbridgeNotices
posts.text: Reminder: The main library in Northbridge will be closed for routine maintenance this Tuesday between 2pm and 4pm. We'll have a sign posted at the entrance. Apologies for any inconvenience! #librarynews
posts.explanation: This is a benign administrative notice about local facility hours that poses no risk to users or public safety, so it should be approved.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: MasonBell
posts.text: URGENT: Evacuate Bellmere NOW! The platform has confirmed severe contamination at the water supply and infrastructure failure in Greyford causing unsafe movement. Do not use public transport until further notice. #emergency #evacuation
posts.explanation: The post spreads an unverified evacuation warning about infrastructure failure that could cause unsafe public movement, requiring specialist escalation to PublicSafetyEmergency.
